PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE- OSC W/ APPLICATION;STANDING ORDER TO ATTEND FCS ORIENTATION

CAROLE CULLUM WITH PETITIONER. RESPONDENT IN PRO PER. RESPONDENT SIGNED STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PARTIES SENT TO FCS. PARTIES RETURNED FROM FCS WITH MEDIATOR ANDREW WALLACE AND A AGREEMENT ON CC & CV, WHICH WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. PARTIES WERE SWORN. PETITIONER WAS VOIR DIRED BY HER COUNSEL AS TO THE JURISDICTIONAL FACTS FOR JUDGMENT OF DISSOLUTION. THE COURT VOIR DIRED RESPONDENT AS TO HIS UNDERSTANDING OF THE TERMS OF THE STATUS ONLY JUDGMENT. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT ENTERED A STATUS ONLY JUDGMENT. MARITAL STATUS TERMINATED EFFECTIVE AS OF TODAY'S DATE. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER SHALL PREPARE JUDGMENT FOR DISSOLUTION. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193.

(404/MAS) CAROLE CULLUM WITH PET. RESP IN PRO PER. PARTIES PREVIOUSLY ATTENDED FCS MEDIATION WITH ANDREW WALLACE AND STIPULATION WAS NOT REACHED. AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, COURT ORDERS FOCUSED EVALUATION SHALL OCCUR TO SPECIFICALLY LOOK INTO THE FOLLOWING: ALLEGATIONS OF DRUG USE AND VIOLENCE AND FAMILIES' LIVING SITUATIONS.
